title: Dark Charred Moroccan Oats Tagine
description: A charred, creamy one-pot Moroccan dish featuring ground oats and nuka-pickle, gluten-free friendly.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is dark brown and charred, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the ground cumin and smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the ground oats and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped nuka-pickle, chicken broth, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
